# RAW Golf Academy

> Private golf lessons in Springfield, NJ from Richard Wenz at GolfCube Social. The R.A.W. method on GOLFZON TwoVision NX simulators, built on the lineage of Harry Vardon, Ernie Jones, Angel and Manuel de la Torre. 30+ years of teaching.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://rawgolfacademy.com/): Overview, pricing, fundamentals, testimonials
- [The Approach](https://rawgolfacademy.com/approach/): The R.A.W. method, learning path, GOLFZON simulator data, instructor bio
- [Contact](https://rawgolfacademy.com/contact/): Phone (973) 713-6462. Inside GolfCube Social, Springfield NJ. Open 9AM–8PM daily.
- [Gallery](https://rawgolfacademy.com/gallery/): Photos of the simulator bay, lounge, and pro shop
- [The Clubhouse](https://rawgolfacademy.com/clubhouse/): Golf tips and swing insights
- [Pro Shop](https://rawgolfacademy.com/proshop/): Coming soon — PING, Tour Edge, TaylorMade gear

## Lessons & Pricing

- Single lesson: $135 / 60 minutes
- 6-lesson package: $675 (pay for 5, get the 6th free)
- All lessons on the GOLFZON TwoVision NX simulator (tracks up to 20 data points per shot + four-stage weight transfer + dual-angle 120fps swing video)

## The R.A.W. Method

Three core fundamentals: grip, stance, posture. The method emphasizes natural rhythm, tempo, and balance — no gimmicks, no swing-of-the-week trends. Taught by Richard Allen Wenz, who has 30+ years of teaching experience and trained alongside top professional instructors in North America.

## Contact

- Phone / Text: (973) 713-6462
- Location: Inside GolfCube Social, Springfield, NJ
- Hours: Monday–Sunday, 9AM to 8PM
